## main.jsx router

### main_jsx
# main_jsx

import React from 'react';
import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client';
import App from './MOCKUP.jsx';
import MeetingMinutesApp from './MeetingMinutesApp.jsx';

function Router() {
  const path = typeof window !== 'undefined' ? window.location.pathname : '/';
  const match = path.match(/^\/meetings\/([^/]+)\/?$/);
  if (match) return <MeetingMinutesApp slug={decodeURIComponent(match[1])} />;
  return <App />;
}

createRoot(document.getElementById('root')).render(
  <React.StrictMode>
    <Router />
  </React.StrictMode>
);

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-05-24 10:14:18Z)**_

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-05-24 10:14:23Z)**_

**Diagnosis: deployment is empty.**

Root cause chain:
1. `.gitignore` excludes `dist/` → Vercel also honors gitignore for uploads
2. Latest deployment's build step ran `0ms` (no build executed) → empty deployment → 404
3. Previous working deploys took 11-13s (real Vite builds); recent 2-minute-old deploy took 2s (no build ran)

Two ways to fix:
- **(A) Let Vercel build**: ensure framework=Vite, deploy from source. Vercel runs `vite build` itself.
- **(B) Prebuild + ship dist**: build locally, add `.vercelignore` allowing dist, deploy with `--prebuilt`.

Going with **(A)** — simpler, matches the working setup from yesterday. Let me set framework and redeploy.

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-05-24 10:15:44Z)**_

Fixed. Both URLs now HTTP 200.

**Root cause**: Vercel project framework preset was `Other` → no build ran (`0ms`), and `.gitignore` excluded `dist/` from upload → empty deployment → 404.

**Fix**: added `framework: vite`, `buildCommand`, `outputDirectory: dist`, `installCommand` to `vercel_mockup/vercel.json`. Redeployed — Vite built 2270 modules on Vercel.

Live:
- https://fandsbookingapp-mockup.vercel.app/
- https://fandsbookingapp-mockup.vercel.app/meetings/2026-05-24

---

1	import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
2	import MeetingMinutes20260524Screen from './screens/MeetingMinutes20260524.jsx';
3	
4	const MEETINGS = {
5	  '2026-05-24': { Component: MeetingMinutes20260524Screen, label: 'May 24, 2026' },
6	};
7	
8	function NotFound({ slug }) {
9	  return (
10	    <div className="min-h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center px-6 py-12 text-center" style={{ background: '#F8F7F4' }}>
11	      <div className="text-5xl mb-4">📭</div>
12	      <h1 className="text-lg font-bold mb-2" style={{ color: '#1A1A2E' }}>Meeting not found</h1>
13	      <p className="text-sm mb-1" style={{ color: '#6B7280' }}>
14	        No minutes exist for <code className="px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded" style={{ background: '#E5E7EB', fontFamily: 'monospace', fontSize: 12 }}>{slug || '(no date)'}</code>.
15	      </p>
16	      <p className="text-xs mt-4" style={{ color: '#9CA3AF' }}>
17	        Available: {Object.keys(MEETINGS).join(', ')}
18	      </p>
19	    </div>
20	  );
21	}
22	
23	export default function MeetingMinutesApp({ slug }) {
24	  const entry = MEETINGS[slug];
25	  const Screen = entry?.Component;
26	  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false);
27	  const [isDesktop, setIsDesktop] = useState(false);
28	
29	  useEffect(() => {
30	    const mq = window.matchMedia('(min-width: 768px)');
31	    const onChange = () => setIsDesktop(mq.matches);
32	    onChange();
33	    mq.addEventListener('change', onChange);
34	    return () => mq.removeEventListener('change', onChange);
35	  }, []);
36	
37	  const handleShare = async () => {
38	    const url = window.location.href;
39	    try {
40	      if (navigator.share) {
41	        await navigator.share({ title: `Meeting Minutes · ${entry?.label || slug}`, url });
42	      } else {
43	        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(url);
44	        setCopied(true);
45	        setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 1800);
46	      }
47	    } catch {
48	      /* user cancelled or clipboard blocked — no-op */
49	    }
50	  };
51	
52	  const screenEl = Screen ? <Screen /> : <NotFound slug={slug} />;
53	
54	  // Mobile (<md): full-screen, no phone frame
55	  if (!isDesktop) {
56	    return (
57	      <div style={{ background: '#F8F7F4', minHeight: '100vh' }}>
58	        <div className="sticky top-0 z-20 flex items-center justify-between px-3 py-2" style={{ background: '#1A1A2E', borderBottom: '1px solid #2D1B4E' }}>
59	          <span className="text-[11px] font-mono text-white/60">MoM · {slug || '—'}</span>
60	          <button
61	            onClick={handleShare}
62	            className="text-[11px] font-semibold px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-white transition-colors"
63	            style={{ background: copied ? '#16A34A' : '#FF385C' }}
64	          >
65	            {copied ? '✓ Link copied' : '↗ Share'}
66	          </button>
67	        </div>
68	        {screenEl}
69	      </div>
70	    );
71	  }
72	
73	  // Desktop: rendered inside an iPhone-style phone frame, centered
74	  return (
75	    <div style={{ background: '#111827', minHeight: '100vh', fontFamily: 'Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif' }}>
76	      <div className="px-4 py-2 flex items-center justify-between text-xs" style={{ background: '#1F2937', color: '#9CA3AF', borderBottom: '1px solid #374151' }}>
77	        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
78	          <span style={{ color: '#E5E7EB', fontWeight: 600 }}>F and S Marine Transport Inc.</span>
79	          <span>·</span>
80	          <span>Meeting Minutes · {entry?.label || slug}</span>
81	        </div>
82	        <button
83	          onClick={handleShare}
84	          className="text-[11px] font-semibold px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-white transition-colors"
85	          style={{ background: copied ? '#16A34A' : '#FF385C' }}
86	        >
87	          {copied ? '✓ Link copied' : '↗ Share this link'}
88	        </button>
89	      </div>
90	
91	      <div className="flex items-start justify-center py-8 px-4">
92	        <div
93	          style={{
94	            width: 390,
95	            height: 'calc(100vh - 100px)',
96	            maxHeight: 844,
97	            background: '#000',
98	            borderRadius: 44,
99	            padding: 12,
100	            boxShadow: '0 30px 60px -15px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.05)',
101	            flexShrink: 0,
102	          }}
103	        >
104	          <div
105	            style={{
106	              width: '100%',
107	              height: '100%',
108	              background: '#F8F7F4',
109	              borderRadius: 32,
110	              overflow: 'hidden',
111	              position: 'relative',
112	            }}
113	          >
114	            <div style={{ width: '100%', height: '100%', overflowY: 'auto', WebkitOverflowScrolling: 'touch' }}>
115	              {screenEl}
116	            </div>
117	            {/* Home indicator */}
118	            <div
119	              style={{
120	                position: 'absolute',
121	                bottom: 8,
122	                left: '50%',
123	                transform: 'translateX(-50%)',
124	                width: 120,
125	                height: 4,
126	                background: '#1A1A2E',
127	                borderRadius: 2,
128	                opacity: 0.4,

137	        Powered by Powerbyte I.T. Solutions · © 2026

140	  );

```text
import React, { useState } from 'react';

const COLORS = {
  primary: '#FF385C',
  ink: '#1A1A2E',
  inkMuted: '#6B7280',
  bg: '#F8F7F4',
  bgCard: '#FFFFFF',
  border: '#E5E7EB',
  success: '#16A34A',
  warning: '#D97706',
  destructive: '#DC2626',
  blue: '#1E40AF',
  amber: '#A16207',
  purple: '#7C3AED',
  coral: '#FF385C',
};

const Badge = ({ children, color = COLORS.primary, bg = '#FFE5E9' }) => (
  <span className="text-[10px] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full" style={{ background: bg, color }}>
    {children}
  </span>
);

const StatusDot = ({ status }) => {
  const map = {
    'needs-decision': { color: COLORS.warning, label: 'Needs Client Decision', bg: '#FEF3C7' },
    'for-review': { color: COLORS.blue, label: 'For Review', bg: '#DBEAFE' },
    'confirmed': { color: COLORS.success, label: 'Confirmed', bg: '#DCFCE7' },
    'new-feature': { color: COLORS.purple, label: 'New Feature Request', bg: '#EDE9FE' },
    'scope-change': { color: COLORS.coral, label: 'Scope Change', bg: '#FFE5E9' },
  };
  const s = map[status] || map['for-review'];
  return (
    <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[11px] font-semibold px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full" style={{ background: s.bg, color: s.color }}>
      <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full" style={{ background: s.color }} />
      {s.label}
    </span>
  );
};
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-05-24 10:18:56Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```md
---
name: feedback-meeting-minutes-no-mobile-frame
description: Meeting minutes pages must render natively on all viewports — no iPhone/phone frame, no forced mobile-width container, no fake device chrome
metadata:
  type: feedback
---

Meeting minutes screens (under `/meetings/<slug>`) must render natively — no iPhone frame, no 390px-wide mobile simulation, no centered phone mockup on desktop.

**Why:** The user finds the phone-frame presentation annoying for meeting minutes. Meeting minutes are documents meant to be read at the user's actual screen size, not viewed as a mobile UX preview. The phone frame is only appropriate for the main MOCKUP.jsx app (which is the simulated mobile booking product).

**How to apply:** When building or modifying `vercel_mockup/src/MeetingMinutesApp.jsx` or any other meeting-minutes wrapper, render the screen content directly in a normal responsive container (mobile = full-width, desktop = centered readable max-width). No `matchMedia` branching to swap in a phone shell. The share bar / header is fine; the device frame is not.

```

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import MeetingMinutes20260524Screen from './screens/MeetingMinutes20260524.jsx';

const MEETINGS = {
  '2026-05-24': { Component: MeetingMinutes20260524Screen, label: 'May 24, 2026' },
};

function NotFound({ slug }) {
  return (
    <div className="min-h-[60vh] flex flex-col items-center justify-center px-6 py-12 text-center">
      <div className="text-5xl mb-4">📭</div>
      <h1 className="text-lg font-bold mb-2" style={{ color: '#1A1A2E' }}>Meeting not found</h1>
      <p className="text-sm mb-1" style={{ color: '#6B7280' }}>
        No minutes exist for <code className="px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded" style={{ background: '#E5E7EB', fontFamily: 'monospace', fontSize: 12 }}>{slug || '(no date)'}</code>.
      </p>
      <p className="text-xs mt-4" style={{ color: '#9CA3AF' }}>
        Available: {Object.keys(MEETINGS).join(', ')}
      </p>
    </div>
  );
}

export default function MeetingMinutesApp({ slug }) {
  const entry = MEETINGS[slug];
  const Screen = entry?.Component;
  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false);

  const handleShare = async () => {
    const url = window.location.href;
    try {
      if (navigator.share) {
        await navigator.share({ title: `Meeting Minutes · ${entry?.label || slug}`, url });
      } else {
        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(url);
        setCopied(true);
        setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 1800);
      }
    } catch {
      /* user cancelled or clipboard blocked — no-op */
    }
  };

  return (
    <div style={{ background: '#F8F7F4', minHeight: '100vh', fontFamily: 'Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif' }}>
      <div
        className="sticky top-0 z-20 flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2.5"
        style={{ background: '#1A1A2E', borderBottom: '1px solid #2D1B4E' }}
      >
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 min-w-0">
          <span className="text-xs font-semibold text-white truncate">F and S Marine Transport Inc.</span>
          <span className="text-white/40 hidden sm:inline">·</span>
          <span className="text-[11px] text-white/70 truncate hidden sm:inline">
            Meeting Minutes · {entry?.label || slug}
          </span>
        </div>
        <button
          onClick={handleShare}
          className="text-[11px] font-semibold px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-white transition-colors flex-shrink-0"
          style={{ background: copied ? '#16A34A' : '#FF385C' }}
        >
          {copied ? '✓ Link copied' : '↗ Share'}
        </button>
      </div>

      <div className="mx-auto" style={{ maxWidth: 820 }}>
        {Screen ? <Screen /> : <NotFound slug={slug} />}
      </div>

      <div className="text-center py-6 text-[10px]" style={{ color: '#9CA3AF' }}>
        Powered by Powerbyte I.T. Solutions · © 2026
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
